title: create_repository_branch_response
description: Response schema for the create_repository_branch agent that creates and pushes a new Git branch.

status.description: The result of the branch creation operation. Use 'success' when the branch was created and pushed successfully. Use 'failed' when all attempts to create and push the branch failed.

branch_name.description: The name of the branch that was created and pushed (e.g. 'duo/fix/123-description'). Required when status is 'success'. Omit or leave empty when status is 'failed'.

error.description: A summary of why the branch creation failed. Required when status is 'failed'. Omit or leave empty when status is 'success'.
examples: Branch name rejected by remote after 5 attempts
